title: Aurora, 1823, Pistachio Gelato Bear 9In, Soft Toy, Green
features: Meet Pistachio Gelato Bear Soft Toy, the softest, sweetest, and most adorable Gelato Bear soft toy by Aurora World! With its luxuriant green fur and heartwarming charm, Pistachio Gelato Bear is more than just a plush toy; it's a lifelong friend that promises endless hugs, comfort, and joy.

Crafted with the utmost care and attention to detail, this green-coloured Pistachio Gelato Bear is made from the softest, premium-quality materials. Its plush, velvety texture is a sensory delight that invites cosy snuggles and tender moments.

Whether you're a child, a teenager, or an adult, this 23cm tall Bear is designed to be loved by everyone as this toy is suitable from birth. It's the ideal gift for birthdays, baby showers, anniversaries, or just to show someone how much you care. Not just a toy, Strawberry Bear also serves as a charming décor piece. Place it on your bed, sofa, or nursery shelf to add a touch of whimsy and elegance to your living spaces.

Pistachio Gelato Bear is a part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming bear soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved soft toys.

Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved soft toy. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
